pre_assessment.planned_strategy: Use by(compute) to verify the concrete constant relationships, then let SMT chain from limb bounds
stated_uncertainties: Whether by(compute) handles the large constants directly

post_assessment.stated_surprises: The proof needed explicit per-limb assertions to trigger the fe51_limbs_bounded quantifier, plus 4 by(compute) facts. More verbose than expected but conceptually simple.
post_assessment.alternate_strategy: Could use assert forall to avoid repeating per-limb assertions, or bundle all by(compute) into fewer assertions

diagnosis.strategy_detail: by(compute) for constant arithmetic, explicit limb assertions to unpack the forall
diagnosis.lemma_detail: No external lemmas needed — pure compute
diagnosis.verus_detail: Used by(compute) correctly for constant arithmetic
diagnosis.over_detail: Could be more concise but correct
